headline: Strategy Stock is Trading at a Discount: Should You Buy, Sell or Hold?
summary: MSTR trades at a deep discount with strong earnings growth, but Bitcoin volatility and weak stock performance complicate the case for investors.

headline: Stocks Mixed as US Set to Blockade the Strait of Hormuz
summary: The S&P 500 Index ($SPX ) (SPY ) today is up +0.05%, the Dow Jones Industrial Average ($DOWI ) (DIA ) is down -0.39%, and the Nasdaq 100 Index ($IUXX ) (QQQ ) is up +0.21%. Stock indexes are mixed this morning even as crude oil prices surge after President...
